title: WELLNESS AND COMMUNITY HEALTH - 211info
text: RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH WELLNESS AND COMMUNITY HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps families experiencing barriers in their health care. Community health workers and certified application counselors provide health insurance application assistance, care coordination, wraparound support, and referrals to community resources. 3995 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Families with children under age 17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 726-1465 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 726-1465 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information; accepts referrals from therapists, parents, teachers, primary care physicians, psychiatrists, and community agencies FEES: None; may bill Oregon Health Plan (Medicaid) DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Case/Care Management * At Risk Families Navigator Programs Specialized Information and Referral * At Risk Families Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLABORATIVE PROBLEM SOLVING MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DAY TREATMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INTENSIVE SCHOOL AND COMMUNITY BASED PROGRAMS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH
